title: desmodium longiarticulatum
intro: Desmodium longiarticulatum, also known as long-stemmed tick clover or tick trefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. This plant is a perennial legume native to Southeast Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Desmodium longiarticulatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis. Desmodium longiarticulatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried powders, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
